West Africa

Cabo Verde Travel Guide

Best for sun-and-sea travel, remote work escapes, and easy winter warmth.

Destination guide to Cabo Verde

Cabo Verde combines island leisure, winter sun, water sports, and relatively easy resort logistics for travelers who want a lighter Atlantic break.

Getting around

International arrivals typically connect through Sal or Praia depending on the island focus.

Best time to visit

November to June is reliable for dry sunshine, while July to October is warmer and can be more humid.

Planning notes

Use this guide to compare what the country does best, how its main attractions connect, where stays and restaurants fit into the route, and which details to verify before committing to a booking.

Sal Island

Hilton Cabo Verde Sal Resort

A polished Santa Maria resort for travelers who want reliable beach logistics and a comfortable Atlantic island base.

Dining

Dining ideas that add flavor to the journey

Image slot Restaurant Barracuda Restaurant Sal

Sal Island

Barracuda Restaurant

Santa Maria has a real independent dining scene, and Barracuda fits travelers who want seafood outside the resort buffet rhythm.

★ 4.3 (421) $$
Cabo Verdean seafood
